title: Aero Prettier plugin options
description: Additive schema for @aero-js/prettier-plugin-aero. Merged with the SchemaStore Prettier schema by the Aero VS Code extension.

aeroAttributePrefix.markdownDescription:
Prefix form for Aero build directives.

- `none`: bare names (`props`, `for`, `if`, …)
- `aero`: `aero-*` names
- `data-aero`: `data-aero-*` names

Plain HTML attributes (e.g. `<label for="email">`) are never rewritten.

aeroBracketSpacing.markdownDescription:
Add spaces inside Aero template braces (`{ expr }` vs `{expr}`).

Inner JS/TS object literals still follow Prettier's `bracketSpacing`.

aeroSelfClosingComponents.markdownDescription:
Prefer self-closing tags for `*-component` elements without children.

`*-layout` tags always keep explicit close tags.
